title: SendGrid Templates for Delete and Cancellation Emails
description:
Integrate two new SendGrid email templates for account management notifications:

1. **Pending invitation delete** (template ID: `6e3634f405994bada2ef7ab2e223648b`) — sent when an account owner deletes a pending invitation, informing the invited user that the invitation has been cancelled.

2. **Shared user removal** (template ID: `a79f9144e0144c2d96b95f9a481664f2`) — sent when an account owner removes an existing shared user from their account.
acceptance_criteria: Deleting a pending invitation sends an email using the pending delete template
Removing a shared user sends an email using the shared user delete template
Both emails use dynamic SendGrid templates with correct template IDs
Recipients receive clear notification of the action taken
middleware_changes: Two new SendGrid notification classes using the delete/removal template IDs with dynamic payload data.
comment_summary: Developer implemented both email templates and pushed to staging for review.
